Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

HANE/M 8, 180-183 [Sale of shares in temple enterer's prebend][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

mana-GAL-d60 DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši-d60 DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 u md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ m⸢ba⸣-[la-ṭu DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60]

o 22

A-MEŠ mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂-nu ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina ⸢1*en⸣ [u₄-mu ina U₄ 16-KAM₂]

o 33

U₄ 17-KAM₂ u U₄ 18-KAM₂ PAP ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina u₄-mu-MEŠ MU-MEŠ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA-šu₂-[nu lu₂KU₄ E₂u₂-tu₂]

o 44

IGI dEN.LIL₂ dIDIM d30 dUTU dIŠKUR dAMAR.UTU dna-na-a dGAŠAN-<ša₂>-e₂[SAG]1

o 55

u DINGIR-MEŠ E₂-šu₂-nu gab-bi ša₂ ITIus-su kal MU.AN.NA gu-uq-qa-ne₂-⸢e⸣ [U₄.EŠ.EŠ-MEŠ]

o 66

u mim-ma gab-bi ša₂ a-na ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂KU₄ E₂u₂-tu₂ ina [u₄-mu-MEŠ]

o 77

MU-MEŠ ik-kaš-ši-du ša₂ it-ti mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU u EN-MEŠ ḪA.⸢LA⸣-[MEŠ-šu₂-nu]

o 88

gab-bi a-na 1 MA.NA 5 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR is-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ mse-lu-ku bab-[ba-nu-u₂-tu₂]

o 99

a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši A mE₂.KUR-za-kir ⸢a⸣-[na]

o 1010

u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ it-ta-din-ʾu KU₃.BABBAR a₄ 1 MA.NA 5 GIN₂ ŠAM₂ ši-iš-[šu₂]

o 1111

ša₂ u₄-mu GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂KU₄ E₂u₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ TILri mana-GAL-d60 DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši-[d60]

o 1212

u md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mba-la-ṭu ina ŠU-MIN md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši maḫ-⸢ru⸣-[ʾu]

o 1313

e-ṭir₃-ʾu u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi ši-iš-šu₂ ša₂ u₄-mu ina 1en u₄-mu ina U₄ 16-[KAM₂]

o 1414

U₄ 17-KAM₂ u U₄ 18-KAM₂ GIŠ.ŠUB.BA lu₂KU₄ E₂u₂-tu₂ MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂ mni-din-[tu₄-d60]

o 1515

DUMU ša₂ mta-nit-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mba-la-ṭu u md60-GI DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A-MEŠ mlu-uš-tam-⸢mar⸣-[dIŠKUR]

o 1616

u mana-GAL-d60 DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši-d60 u md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mba-la-ṭu lu₂na-din-na-ʾa

o 1717

⸢GIŠ*⸣.ŠUB.BA MU-MEŠ ⸢u₂*-mar*⸣-raq-ma-ʾa a-di 12-TA.AM₃ a-na md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-⸢ba⸣-[ši*]

Reverse
rr beginning broken
r 1'1'

[u₄-mu ma-la md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši ṣe-bu-u₂]

r 2'2'

[GIŠ.ŠUB.BA] ⸢MU⸣-MEŠ

r 3'3'

[ina gišDA GIŠ.ŠUB.BA-MEŠ ša₂ ina E₂ DINGIR-MEŠ ina MU-šu₂ u₂-šal]-⸢lam⸣

(witnesses)
r 4'4'

lu₂mu-kin₇

r 5'5'

md60-MUnu [u md60-ŠEŠ-GUR DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mNUMUN-ia u m liGIŠ DUMU ša₂ mNUMUN-ia DUMU ša₂ md60-GI] ⸢A⸣-MEŠ [mŠU-d60]

r 6'6'

[m]d60-DIN-su-E [DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d]⸢60⸣

r 7'7'

A mḫun-zu-u₂ [mdna-na-a-MU DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 u mba-la-ṭu DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ]-MUnu

r 8'8'

[A-MEŠ m]⸢lu⸣-uš-tam-mar-⸢d⸣[IŠKUR mba-as-si-ia DUMU ša₂ mdINANA-MU-KAM₂ A mE₂.KUR-za-kir]

r 9'9'

m[d60]-⸢AD⸣-URI₃ DUMU ša₂ md⸢na⸣-[na-a-x A mkur-i mla-ba-ši-d60 DUMU ša₂ mtat-tan-nu]

r 10'10'

[A m]E₂.KUR-za-kir md60-ŠEŠ-⸢MU⸣ [DUMU ša₂ md60-DINiṭ A mḫun-zu-u₂ md60-DU-A DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU]

r 11'11'

[A m]ŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu md60-DINiṭ [DUMU ša₂ md60-BAša₂-an-nu A md30-TI-ER₂ md60-AD-URI₃]

r 12'12'

[DUMU ša₂] mina-qi₂-bit-d60 DUMU ša₂ mKAR-[d60 A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR]

(colophon)
r 13'13'

[mni]-din-tu₄-d60 lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ md60-[DINiṭ A md30-TI-ER₂ UNUGki itiBARA₂]

r 14'14'

[U₄] 27-KAM₂ MU ⸢78-KAM₂⸣ [mse-lu-ku LUGAL]

mla-ba-ši-d60

1typical orthography favors restoration of SAG over Corò's re-eš. šá omitted by scribe.

2collation LP, 6/2009
